prompt.structuredPrompt:
best laptop on this segement and i have high performance with rtx 4060 graphic card , best for gaming and also high end ram ddr5 32gb with 2tb ssd and it have oled dispaly. And have best processore ryzen 9 series
Product: ASUS ROG Strix G15
Details: Gaming laptop with high refresh rate display

sceneData.title: Introduction
sceneData.imagePrompt: A sleek, closed ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop centered vertically, with a glowing ROG logo, against a dark, moody background with subtle neon highlights.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A slow cinematic reveal of the ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop, panning up its textured lid to focus on the glowing ROG logo. Dark, futuristic environment with ambient neon light reflections.
sceneData.voiceLine: Introducing the ASUS ROG Strix G15, the pinnacle of gaming performance.

sceneData.title: Processor Power
sceneData.imagePrompt: A vertical shot of the ASUS ROG Strix G15 laptop opening, with a dramatic glow emanating from the keyboard and screen. An abstract Ryzen 9 logo is subtly visible in the background.
sceneData.videoPrompt: The laptop lid smoothly opens, revealing the RGB keyboard which illuminates in a wave of color. A stylized, holographic AMD Ryzen 9 logo briefly appears and dissolves above the keyboard.
sceneData.voiceLine: Powered by the formidable AMD Ryzen 9 series processor, it handles the most demanding tasks with ease.

sceneData.title: Graphics Card
sceneData.imagePrompt: A vertical, dynamic in-game screenshot from a futuristic racing game, displayed on the laptop's screen, showcasing intense motion blur and ray-traced reflections.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A fast-paced montage of visually stunning gameplay, focusing on explosions and realistic lighting effects, seamlessly transitioning to a close-up of the RTX 4060 branding on the laptop chassis.
sceneData.voiceLine: Experience next-generation visuals with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 graphics card, delivering unparalleled realism.

sceneData.title: RAM and SSD
sceneData.imagePrompt: An abstract, high-tech visualization of data streams flowing at high speed, with neon blue and magenta lines representing the DDR5 RAM and 2TB SSD working in harmony.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A stylized, abstract animation showing glowing data particles rapidly moving through futuristic circuits, symbolizing the immense speed of the 32GB DDR5 RAM and 2TB SSD.
sceneData.voiceLine: Multitask seamlessly and load games in an instant with 32 gigabytes of DDR5 RAM and a massive 2-terabyte SSD.

sceneData.title: OLED Display
sceneData.imagePrompt: A stunning close-up of the ASUS ROG Strix G15's OLED screen, displaying a vibrant, colorful nebula with deep, perfect blacks at the edges. The focus is on the incredible color accuracy and contrast.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A slow pan across the laptop's OLED display, showing a hyper-detailed, colorful fantasy world with incredible vibrancy. The camera focuses on the crisp details and deep blacks of the scene.
sceneData.voiceLine: Immerse yourself in breathtaking color and clarity on the stunning high-refresh-rate OLED display.

sceneData.title: Conclusion
sceneData.imagePrompt: A powerful, final hero shot of the fully open ASUS ROG Strix G15, viewed from a low angle, with the screen and keyboard glowing brightly in a dark, atmospheric setting.
sceneData.videoPrompt: A dramatic 360-degree orbit around the ASUS ROG Strix G15, showcasing its design from all angles before settling on a powerful frontal shot. The brand name appears on screen.
sceneData.voiceLine: The ASUS ROG Strix G15: Engineered for victory.

scenes.voiceScript: Introducing the ASUS ROG Strix G15, the pinnacle of gaming performance. Powered by the formidable AMD Ryzen 9 series processor, it handles the most demanding tasks with ease. Experience next-generation visuals with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 graphics card, delivering unparalleled realism. Multitask seamlessly and load games in an instant with 32 gigabytes of DDR5 RAM and a massive 2-terabyte SSD. Immerse yourself in breathtaking color and clarity on the stunning high-refresh-rate OLED display. The ASUS ROG Strix G15: Engineered for victory.
scenes.thumbnailPrompt: A dramatic hero shot of the ASUS ROG Strix G15 gaming laptop, angled view, lid slightly open to reveal a glowing keyboard, set against a dark, abstract background with neon light streaks, professional product photography, hyper-realistic, 8k.
scenes.globalVisualStyle: Cinematic, professional product videography, dark futuristic aesthetic with neon blue and magenta accents, sharp focus, high contrast, 8K resolution, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
